changes_made.description: Added --wrap=none flag to all pandoc text extraction commands to prevent line wrapping that splits sentences across lines (was causing 'March 2026' to be split across two lines, failing content tests)

Added python-docx text extraction method as recommended approach (more reliable than pandoc -t plain which omits Title-style headings). Added python-docx as alternative for document creation with guidance to use heading level 1 instead of 0 for main titles. Updated text extraction step in creation workflow to reference python-docx method.
